reason_for_decision: The revised article keeps the topic high-level and non-actionable while explaining clearly why high-power microwave effects are response-layer tools rather than standalone solutions.

It keeps safety, sensing, geometry, and operator control central to the analysis.

summary_assessment: This version passes. It is disciplined, non-hyped, and properly framed around layered counter-UAS architecture rather than speculative effect claims.
